description: Use this API to purge an optimal power flow polynomial and exponential cost curve record from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = purge_opf_csttbl_poly(tbl)

parameters.name: tbl
parameters.description: Polynomial and exponential cost curve table number. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: specified polynomial cost table does not exist.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
